chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI H.C.A. No.80 of 2007 Muhammad Akhtar Khan & another Versus Hanif Merchant Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For hearing of CMA 1153/07 Dated: 16.01.2024 Mr. Yasir Ali for appellants. Ms. Summayya for respondent. -.-.- This matter is pending since last 17 years and for last several dates requests are being made for adjournment to assist the Court but all in vain as today yet again Mr. Yasir who has been holding brief in the matter for quite some time has again requested for adjournment and submits that he would proceed with the matter on the next date. It seems that appellants and their counsel have lost interest in the proceedings. Instant High Court Appeal is accordingly dismissed for non- prosecution along with listed application. Judge Judge
